appearance.clothing: White 狩灵协会1科 overcoat, black hot pants, thigh-high socks, combat boots.
appearance.weapon: Two-handed greatsword 暴行 from 鹤望兰工坊. Splits into longer and shorter swords for dual-wielding; gains flexibility at cost of defensive stability.

char_background.origin: Former security company employee, awakened 灵力 during a security mission, her defensive instincts proving exceptional. Joined 狩灵协会 and rose to examiner within three years.
char_background.current_mission: Complete candidate assessments and maintain 狩灵协会1科 rating system. Occasionally deployed for high-grade suppression.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-消力: Releases 灵力 at the moment of impact to absorb force, then releases the absorbed force in counterattack.

char_relationships.斯瓦尔: The only artisan she trusts with her weapons, gave her the specification for 暴行 once, received exactly what was asked for, never needed a revision. Does not waste words, but commissions speak louder than praise.
